locations_inspected.name: Buckeye Industrial Properties, LLC
findings: Roof type: Shingle, age 14 years, condition Poor, estimated remaining useful life 0 years
Plumbing water supply: Fair; pipe material: PVC; water heaters: Electric
HVAC: Split System, age 18 years, maintenance program in place
Electrical service entrance: 400 Amp; panel condition: Fair; GFCI protection: Yes; no emergency/standby power
Automatic sprinkler system: Wet Pipe, N/A coverage; last inspected 1 month ago, NFPA 25 compliant
deficiencies: Roof condition rated Poor with 0 years of estimated remaining useful life

recommendations.description: Address fire protection system deficiencies including expired fire extinguisher tags and sprinkler coverage gaps; renew and certify all 11 extinguisher units
Replace shingle roof rated Poor with 0 years of estimated remaining useful life; immediate remediation required to prevent water intrusion and further structural damage
Remediate deteriorating waste/drain system to prevent failure and property damage
Address deteriorating building envelope integrity to prevent moisture intrusion and further deterioration
Service aging 18-year-old Split System HVAC currently rated as needing service; evaluate for replacement given age
Evaluate installation of emergency/standby power given current absence; monitor Fair-rated electrical panel

overall_assessment.summary: An on-site inspection was conducted at 9 locations for Buckeye Industrial Properties, LLC on 01/18/2026. The survey assessed fire protection, building construction, occupancy hazards, and general risk management practices. Key deficiencies include a roof at end of useful life (0 years remaining, rated Poor), deteriorating building envelope integrity and waste/drain system, an HVAC system needing service, and expired fire extinguisher tags. Capital expenditure requirements total $63,861 immediate, $117,495 short-term (Yr 1-2), and $887,290 in reserve (Yr 3-12) across Plumbing, Roofing, and Fire Protection systems.
